options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <transition_time> # Specifies the transition time. (float, required) <object_list> # List of objects: instance pins or ports

options.name: -fall
options.description: Sets ideal transition with respect to fall edge

options.name: -max
options.description: Sets ideal transition with respect to max corner

options.name: -min
options.description: Sets ideal transition with respect to min corner

options.name: -rise
options.description: Sets ideal transition with respect to rise edge
